name: Twice Baked Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Good Seasons Gourmet Garlic Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the potatoes in half lengthwise and scoop out the centers, leaving about 1/4 inch of shells.
2. Mash the potatoes.
3. Stir in the sour cream, cheese, milk, onions, and salad dressing mix until combined.
4. Spoon the mixture into the prepared shells.
5. Place on a cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 325°F for 15-20 minutes.
Prep Time: 10 minutes
Cooking Time: 20 minutes
